title: Ukraine Strikes St. Petersburg in Long-Range Drone Attack
summary_full: It was the second such attack in days and came just hours after President Vladimir V. Putin spoke at an economic forum in the city.
summary_public: It was the second such attack in days and came just hours after President Vladimir V. Putin spoke at an economic forum in the city.
